fix_applied.description: In Rule 17b RETREAT, when Kilowattrel is active and attack-ready, override retreat suppression (-300 -> +100) if Voltorb is on bench with 2+ energy and estimated damage >= 120

reasons: Fix never triggered (0 fires in 50 games)
Kilowattrel active + Voltorb bench ready (2+ energy, est_dmg >= 120) condition is extremely rare
Total anomalies improved 257 -> 232 but this is game variance, not caused by fix
No regression in critical/high safety metrics (end/retreat when attack = 0)
The +1 attack_available_but_no_attack and +1 ability_without_followup_attack are noise
Fix is harmless as a safety net
recommendation: Keep fix. F0001+F0002 are both harmless safety nets. Consider F0003 (bellibolt_over_voltorb_high_damage) next if retreat-based approach insufficient.
